element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Dodging and timing through projectile patterns

typical_relief_triggers: Safe platforming sections between enemy clusters
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Fast-paced action with alternating enemy encounters and platforming challenges; intensity escalates per stage

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to basic platforming and sword combat with minimal enemy coordination
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased enemy density, introduction of climbing mechanics and projectile hazards
difficulty_curve.late_game: Complex platforming sections, coordinated multi-enemy encounters, challenging boss patterns
notable_spikes: Stage 3 escalates platforming difficulty with moving obstacles
Final stages combine all mechanics under time pressure

notable_level_patterns.description: Linear horizontal progression interrupted by vertical climbing sections and enemy encounters leading to a boss battle
Clusters of enemies positioned to force player through combat encounters before reaching safe platforming zones
Vertical sections requiring wall/pole climbing with timed jumps between platforms

notes: TCRF source provided only wiki navigation information with no substantive game design data. Analysis cannot proceed with available sources. Recommend supplementing with game manual, gameplay documentation, or design reviews.
